channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Opinion: Mitch McConnell's Long-Term Political Influence Helped Shape the Conditions That Enabled Trump's Rise
item.description: In this opinion article, columnist John Casey argues that former Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell bears significant responsibility for many of the political and institutional developments that...

item.title: Joe Manganiello Details Seven-Year Autoimmune Health Struggle Ahead of Memoir Release
item.description: Actor Joe Manganiello has revealed that he spent the last seven years battling a series of severe autoimmune-related illnesses, a struggle he discusses in his upcoming memoir, Bloodlines. According to...

item.title: Sydney Gallego Rebuts Katie Miller's Claims About Her Family and Corrects Timeline of Relationship With Sen. Ruben Gallego
item.description: A public dispute unfolded on social media after Katie Miller, wife of White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller and a conservative podcast host, criticized Senator Ruben Gallego of Arizona over...

item.title: How Pop-Culture Lunchboxes Became Schoolyard Status Symbols in the 1970s
item.description: The article explores the cultural significance of metal lunchboxes in American schools during the 1970s. More than simple containers for carrying meals, lunchboxes became highly visible status symbols...

item.title: Appeals Court Reconsiders Contempt Inquiry Into Trump Administration's Handling of Deportation Flights
item.description: A legal dispute involving the Trump administration and the federal judiciary is gaining renewed attention after a federal appeals court agreed to reconsider whether a contempt investigation should pro...

item.title: Leonard Cohen Estate Blocks Use of 'Hallelujah' at Trump's Freedom 250 Rally
item.description: The estate of late Canadian singer-songwriter Leonard Cohen publicly opposed and prevented the use of his famous song 'Hallelujah' at President Donald Trump's Freedom 250 rally held on June 24, 2026, ...

item.title: BBC World Service to Host Free Future of Journalism Festival in Nairobi for Students and Media Professionals
item.description: The BBC World Service has announced that it will host the BBC Future of Journalism Festival in Nairobi, Kenya, on July 9 and 10, 2026. The free two-day event will take place at the Chandaria Centre fo...

item.title: Lawsuit Seeks Records on Alleged DHS Actions Affecting Travel Privileges of ICE Observers and Protesters
item.description: A lawsuit filed by The Intercept against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) seeks access to government records concerning allegations that immigration enforcement observers and activists h...

item.title: Trump Media Shares Hit Record Low Amid Ongoing Financial Losses and Strategic Challenges
item.description: Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG), the company behind the social media platform Truth Social, reached its lowest stock price since becoming a publicly traded company in 2024. According to the repo...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Group Stage Concludes for Groups A, B and C with Key Matches Involving Brazil, Mexico and Canada
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup continued with the final round of group-stage matches for Groups A, B and C on June 24. Six games were scheduled across North America, with several teams competing for group ti...

item.title: Wall Street Journal Editorial Board Criticizes Trump for Delaying Housing Bill to Push Election Legislation
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's editorial board sharply criticized President Donald Trump after he abruptly canceled a planned signing ceremony for the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. According to the art...

item.title: Jill Smokler, founder of Scary Mommy, dies at 48 after battle with brain cancer
item.description: Jill Smokler, the creator of the influential parenting website Scary Mommy, has died at the age of 48 following a battle with an aggressive form of brain cancer. She passed away on June 22, two years ...

item.title: Rare Behind-the-Scenes Portraits Showcase Joan Collins During the Filming of 'Land of the Pharaohs' in 1955
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday highlights a collection of rare behind-the-scenes photographs of actress Joan Collins taken during the production of the 1955 historical epic 'Land of the Pharaohs',...

item.title: Jim Acosta and Jamie Raskin Criticize Trump's Handling of Federal Property and Reflecting Pool Vandalism Claims
item.description: Former CNN host Jim Acosta, now hosting his own show, discussed President Donald Trump's recent threats to prosecute individuals for damaging the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool during a conversation...

item.title: Criticism Mounts Over Stephen Miller Social Media Post Interpreted as Extremist Rhetoric
item.description: White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller has sparked widespread criticism following a brief post on X (formerly Twitter) that read, 'Change the voters, change the country.' The statement quick...

item.title: Hope Sandoval's Reserved and Ethereal Stage Presence with Mazzy Star in the 1990s
item.description: In the 1990s, Hope Sandoval emerged as one of the most distinctive figures in alternative rock as the lead singer of Mazzy Star. Known for her understated performances, Sandoval often stood nearly mot...

item.title: Nancy Allen’s 1977 Promotional Photo Session for the Film 'I Wanna Hold Your Hand'
item.description: In 1977, actress Nancy Allen participated in a promotional photo session with photographer KC Bryant in Burbank, California, tied to her role in the upcoming 1978 film 'I Wanna Hold Your Hand.' At the...

item.title: Australia Expands H5N1 Monitoring as Bird Flu Cases Spread to a Second State
item.description: Australian authorities have intensified surveillance and testing efforts after South Australia became the second state to detect the highly pathogenic H5N1 bird flu virus. The latest case was identifi...

item.title: Federal judge permanently blocks Trump executive order on election procedures
item.description: A federal court has issued a major ruling against a Trump-era executive order related to voting and election procedures, permanently blocking its implementation. U.S. District Court Judge Denise Caspe...

item.title: Trump Delays Housing Bill Signing Ceremony, Prompting Questions From Congressional Republicans
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson defended President Donald Trump after the president unexpectedly canceled a planned signing ceremony for the bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. The event had been ...
